overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in western attire walking through a historic town at night. The character navigates muddy cobblestone streets lit by gas lamps, passes through a stone archway into a courtyard, attempts to enter a building with red doors, then returns. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy cobblestone street with historic brick buildings and gas lamps

events.description: character turns left at street intersection
passing under a bright gas lamp creating strong warm illumination

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through muddy streets, turning left at intersection while heading toward an archway

entered.detail: tall red brick wall running along the left side of the narrow street
wooden plank fence on the right side
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
large stone archway connecting the street to the inner courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow muddy street bordered by a brick wall and wooden fence, illuminated by warm gas lamps. The street opens slightly as the character turns left, approaching a stone archway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway passage leading to inner courtyard

events.description: entering covered stone archway from open street
emerging from archway into courtyard with wall-mounted lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into a paved courtyard area

entered.detail: two-story brick building with shuttered windows
brick building with warm wall-mounted lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the covered stone archway, transitioning from the muddy street to a paved courtyard. The lighting shifts to darker tones under the arch before emerging into a courtyard flanked by brick buildings with wall lanterns.

events.description: passing a wooden cart and bench along the building wall
character stops at red doors, attempts to interact, then turns around

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance, walking up to the red doors, then turning around to leave

entered.detail: brick building with prominent red double doors and wall lanterns
old wooden wagon parked against the wall
simple wooden bench near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking through the paved courtyard, the character approaches a building with distinctive red double doors. After passing a wooden cart and bench, the character stops at the entrance, attempts to interact with the doors, then turns around to depart.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through archway to muddy street

events.description: re-entering the covered archway from the courtyard side
exiting archway back onto the muddy cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back through the archway to return to the original street

entered.detail: stone archway viewed from the courtyard side while approaching
wooden fence visible again upon returning to the muddy street

segments.scene_description: The character retraces their steps, passing back through the stone archway from the courtyard to the muddy street. The wooden fence and gas lamps of the original street come back into view as the character exits the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a muddy street through a stone archway into a paved courtyard and back again. It begins with the character walking along a narrow, muddy path bordered by brick walls and wooden fences under the warm glow of gas lamps. As the character turns left, the scene shifts through a covered stone archway, transitioning from the mud to a paved courtyard flanked by brick buildings and wall lanterns. The camera then follows the character past a wooden cart and bench toward a set of distinctive red double doors, where they pause briefly before turning around. Finally, the movement retraces its path, passing back through the dark archway to emerge once more onto the lamp-lit muddy street.
